description: Typer is a library for building CLI applications. Built on top of Click, with type hints.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/typer && python3 typer.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/typer && python3 typer.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/typer && python3 typer.py --help`. CLI library (build on Click).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: CLI library (build on Click).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: CLI library (build on Click).

name: typer

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
